name: 宾川红提
description: 高原日照充足，昼夜温差大，果粒饱满、糖度高、口感脆甜。
description_en: Grown at high altitude with intense sunshine and cool nights, these grapes are plump, sweet, and crisp. Direct from partner farms in Binchuan.

name: 昭通糖心苹果
description: 高海拔种植，果肉细腻，糖心明显，酸甜适口。
description_en: High-altitude apples with a distinctive honey core. Fine-grained flesh, perfectly balanced sweet-tart flavor. Grown above 1,800m in Zhaotong.

name: 元谋番茄
description: 天然温室种植，沙瓤多汁，番茄味浓郁。
description_en: Grown in Yunnan's natural greenhouse region. Mealy, juicy flesh with intense tomato flavor. Winter harvest from Yuanmou's sun-drenched fields.

name: 蒙自石榴
description: 中国石榴之乡，粒大籽软、汁多味甜。
description_en: From China's pomegranate capital. Large arils with soft seeds, bursting with sweet juice. A signature product of Mengzi County.

name: 通海叶菜
description: 云南最大蔬菜基地，品种齐全，冷链直发。
description_en: From Yunnan's largest vegetable production base. Full range of leafy greens, cold-chain shipped year-round.

name: 丽江雪桃
description: 玉龙雪山脚下种植，果大形美，口感清甜。
description_en: Grown at the foot of Jade Dragon Snow Mountain at 2,400m. Large, beautiful fruit with an exceptionally clean, sweet flavor.

name: 文山三七
description: 道地药材，云南省文山州特产，品质上乘。
description_en: Authentic Dao-di medicinal herb from its original growing region in Wenshan. Premium-grade Panax notoginseng root.

name: 楚雄野生菌
description: 松茸、牛肝菌、鸡枞等，高原山林野生采摘。
description_en: Wild-foraged from Yunnan's highland forests. Includes matsutake, porcini, and termite mushrooms. Seasonal availability, price on inquiry.

name: 大理紫皮蒜
description: 洱海流域种植，蒜瓣饱满，蒜香浓郁。
description_en: Grown in the Erhai Lake basin. Large, plump cloves with a rich, aromatic flavor. A staple ingredient prized by chefs.
